response: People with braces are dental appliances designed to correct misaligned teeth and improve bite function. They have no connection to gravitational forces or the ability to manipulate them. The concept of manipulating gravity at will is a fantastical idea that lies outside the realm of current scientific understanding. Braces do not grant any special physical abilities, and there is no evidence linking them to gravitational control. This misunderstanding likely stems from a mix-up between dental equipment and science fiction concepts. The weakness of this belief is its lack of scientific basis. weakness.
